title: Snap to Ticks
text: Snap to Ticks Indicates whether the slider can be moved smoothly or only in increments matching the ticks. Attribute Value Physical Property Name Snap Property Type boolean Dynamic? Yes Default value False Description If selected (True), the slider can be moved only in increments of one minor tick. If cleared (False), the slider can be moved as close (to the nearest pixel) as possible to the position specified by the user (Default). Applies to uslider (Slider) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
